title: Refactor: Extract validator class from controller
original_text: Refactored the codebase by extracting the validation logic from the controller into a separate Validator class. This improves separation of concerns and makes the validation logic reusable across different controllers. The new Validator class is in utils/validator.py. Updated all controllers to use the new class. Added unit tests for the Validator. Result: 50 tests pass.
expected_subject: refactor(utils): extract Validator class from controller
expected_body_lines: - Create utils/validator.py with extracted validation logic
- Update controllers to use new Validator class
- Improve separation of concerns and reusability
- Add unit tests for Validator class
expected_command: git commit -m "refactor(utils): extract Validator class from controller"
